data.title: AI Credit Monitor
data.solution:
tokens_per_request = int(input())
requests_per_day = int(input())
max_tokens = int(input())
used_tokens = int(input())
days_left = int(input())

daily_usage = tokens_per_request * requests_per_day
remaining = max_tokens - used_tokens
days_to_limit = remaining // daily_usage

if days_to_limit <= days_left:
    print(f"At this rate you will reach the maximum quota in {days_to_limit} days")
else:
    print("You will not reach the quota at this pace")
data.statement: You are an AI power user and you want to know if you will reach your monthly token quota before the end of the month. Given your average daily usage, determine whether you will hit the limit and, if so, in how many days.

data.inputDescription:
<<Line 1>>: An integer [[tokensPerRequest]] — the average number of tokens per request.
<<Line 2>>: An integer [[requestsPerDay]] — the average number of requests you make per day.
<<Line 3>>: An integer [[maxTokens]] — the maximum number of tokens allowed per month.
<<Line 4>>: An integer [[usedTokens]] — the number of tokens already used this month.
<<Line 5>>: An integer [[daysLeft]] — the number of days remaining in the month.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You are an AI power user and you want to know if you will reach your monthly token quota before the end of the month. Given your average daily usage, determine whether you will hit the limit and, if so, in how many days.
Input
Line 1: An integer tokensPerRequest — the average number of tokens per request.
Line 2: An integer requestsPerDay — the average number of requests you make per day.
Line 3: An integer maxTokens — the maximum number of tokens allowed per month.
Line 4: An integer usedTokens — the number of tokens already used this month.
Line 5: An integer daysLeft — the number of days remaining in the month.
Output
If you will reach the quota before the end of the month, print:
At this rate you will reach the maximum quota in X days

where X is the number of full days (X rounded down) before reaching the limit.
Otherwise, print:
You will not reach the quota at this pace
Constraints
1 ≤ tokensPerRequest ≤ 10000
1 ≤ requestsPerDay ≤ 500
1 ≤ maxTokens ≤ 100000000
0 ≤ usedTokens ≤ maxTokens
1 ≤ daysLeft ≤ 31
Example
Input
800
40
968000
200000
25
Output
At this rate you will reach the maximum quota in 24 days
